description: Implement findSimilar() and getRelated() methods in semantic-search service. findSimilar() enables 'find code similar to this function' by fetching a vector by ID and searching for similar embeddings. getRelated() combines semantic similarity with graph relationships (imports, calls, extends) to find structurally and semantically related code.
goal: Enable code similarity search and relationship discovery in the RAG system
requirements: Add fetchById() method to VectorStore interface to retrieve embeddings by coderef
Implement fetchById() in SQLiteVectorStore using SQL SELECT by id
Implement fetchById() in PineconeStore using namespace.fetch()
Implement fetchById() in ChromaStore using collection.get()
Implement findSimilar() in semantic-search.ts:245 (replace Not yet implemented error)
Implement getRelated() in semantic-search.ts:293 combining graph traversal + semantic search
Add unit tests for fetchById() in all 3 vector store implementations
out_of_scope: Web API endpoints (only CLI for now)
constraints: Must maintain backward compatibility with existing VectorStore interface
Must work with all 3 vector store backends (SQLite, Pinecone, Chroma)
Must use existing graph-builder for relationship traversal

functional: findSimilar(coderef) returns semantically similar code elements
All 3 vector stores support fetchById() with test coverage
performance: findSimilar completes in <500ms for 1000 vector store
getRelated completes in <1s including graph traversal
